Your account details are:
- Full Name: [Customer Name]
- Account Number: [Last 4 Digits of Account Number]
- Email Address: [Customer Email Address]

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,  
[Bank Name] Customer Service Team  
[Bank Logo or Website URL]  
[Phone Number] | [Email Address] | [Website URL]

[Verify Your Account Details](https://www.examplebank.com/verify-account)

Should you have any questions or need assistance, please contact our Customer Support team at **support@examplebank.com** or call us at **1-800-123-4567**.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,  
**Customer Support Team**  
Example Bank  
[Bank Logo]  
[Website URL] | [Social Media Links] | [Privacy Policy]

**Subject:** Verify Your Account Details – Urgent Action Required

**Body:**

Dear [Customer Name],

We have detected unusual activity on your account and need to verify your personal information to ensure the security of your account.

To protect your account, please click the link below to verify your details:

[Verify Your Account](https://example.com/verify)

This is an urgent request. Failure to verify your details may result in restricted access to your account.

If you did not request this verification, please contact us immediately at [support@examplebank.com](mailto:support@examplebank.com) or call us at 1-800-XXX-XXXX.

Thank you for your prompt
